emails.subject: Reviewer List
emails.body: Reviewer List How's this look? Steve Kean Rick Shapiro (GA) Paul Kaufman (GA) Vicki Sharpe (EES) Mike D. Smith (EES) Chris Calger (ENA) Karen Denne (PA)

emails.subject: Reviewer List
emails.body: Reviewer List How's this look? Steve Kean Rick Shapiro (GA) Paul Kaufman (GA) Vicki Sharpe (EES) Mike D. Smith (EES) Chris Calger (ENA) Karen Denne (PA)

emails.subject: RE: Reviewer List
emails.body: RE: Reviewer List Looks good. You don't need to list me; you get me for free. To: Kaufman, Paul

emails.subject: RE: Reviewer List
emails.body: RE: Reviewer List Looks good. You don't need to list me; you get me for free. To: Kaufman, Paul

emails.subject: RE: Reviewer List
emails.body: Thanks. I'll get you one more name then. FYI: To use a Kaufman phrase, "I'm a little frosted." I'm on a litigation call, on which I mentioned the Plan B (which I got only because I searched out Scott Governor yesterday). On the call Sandi said, "Jeff, there's a response from the Governor to the Plan B, which I faxed to Steffes yesterday." I want you to know that I took a deep breath, and asked Sandi to fax it to the San Francisco office. Unreal.... Best, Jeff Paul Kaufman/ENRON@enronXgate 05/15/2001 11:38 AM

emails.subject: RE: Reviewer List
emails.body: Thanks. I'll get you one more name then. FYI: To use a Kaufman phrase, "I'm a little frosted." I'm on a litigation call, on which I mentioned the Plan B (which I got only because I searched out Scott Governor yesterday). On the call Sandi said, "Jeff, there's a response from the Governor to the Plan B, which I faxed to Steffes yesterday." I want you to know that I took a deep breath, and asked Sandi to fax it to the San Francisco office. Unreal.... Best, Jeff Paul Kaufman/ENRON@enronXgate 05/15/2001 11:38 AM
